title: The Sanctuary of Calm
tagline: Find peace within the storms of life through Sabr and Quranic healing.

stages.title: Maulana on Sabr
stages.description: Listen as our Maulana opens your heart to the wisdom of patience — the anchor of every believer.

stages.title: Recite Surah Ash-Sharh
stages.description: The Surah of Relief. Recite slowly, letting each verse settle in your chest. After hardship comes ease.

stages.title: Your Personal Reflection
stages.description: A Maulana-voiced closing reflection invites you toward the Ask Imam dialogue for deeper, personalized guidance.

title: The Foundation of Prayer
tagline: Master the short Surahs with precision — every letter, every breath, perfected.

stages.title: Makharij of Al-Fatiha
stages.description: Listen to the precise articulation points of Surah Al-Fatiha — isolating the difficult ق vs ك distinction.

stages.title: Word-by-Word Tarjummah
stages.description: Immersive literal translation playback — each word of Al-Fatiha spoken by Maulana's voice with meaning.

stages.title: 7-Day Consistency Milestone
stages.description: Lock in your first milestone. Return daily to build the most powerful habit of your life.

title: The Morning Light
tagline: Seize the barakah of Fajr — a proactive dawn routine for the focused believer.

stages.title: Morning Greeting
stages.description: A time-sensitive Maulana greeting, warm and energising — tailored to the sacred hour of dawn.

stages.title: Surah Al-Alaq — First 5 Verses
stages.description: The first revelation. Recite with flow analysis — feel the weight of the first divine command: Iqra.

title: The Night Vigil
tagline: Enter the sacred stillness of Tahajjud — surrender to the One who never sleeps.

stages.title: The Virtue of Night Prayer
stages.description: Maulana speaks on Surah Al-Muzammil and the spiritual rewards of rising in the night's last third.

stages.title: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas × 3
stages.description: Three repetitions, each worth a third of the Quran. Measured, deliberate, heartfelt.

stages.title: Dua of the Night
stages.description: Maulana closes with the Du'a of the night vigil — then invites you to share your personal supplication with Ask Imam.

title: The Grateful Heart
tagline: Transform your perspective — Shukr is not just gratitude, it is abundance itself.

stages.title: The Ayah of Gratitude
stages.description: Maulana recites and explains Ibrahim 14:7 — 'If you are grateful, I will surely increase you.'

stages.title: Surah Ar-Rahman — Opening
stages.description: Recite the opening verses of the Surah of Divine Mercy. With each 'Fabiayyi ala'i' — feel the gift.

stages.title: Counting Your Blessings
stages.description: A guided Maulana reflection on gratitude journaling in the Islamic tradition. Ask Imam to continue.

title: The Seal of Surahs
tagline: Master the last 10 Surahs — the treasury every Muslim carries in their chest.

stages.title: Why the Last 10 Matter
stages.description: Maulana explains the status of the Mufassal Surahs in Salah and daily life — your essential Quranic toolkit.

stages.title: Surah Al-Kawthar
stages.description: The shortest Surah. Three verses that contain the ocean. Recite with full tajweed precision.

stages.title: Surah Al-Falaq & An-Nas
stages.description: The twin protectors. Recite both Al-Muawwidhatain back to back as the Prophet ﷺ did each night.

title: Stories of the Prophets
tagline: Walk with Ibrahim, Musa, and Isa — their stories are your map through every trial.

stages.title: Ibrahim & the Fire
stages.description: Maulana narrates Ibrahim's trial — the fire that became cool. A story of absolute tawakkul.

stages.title: Ayat of Ibrahim's Prayer
stages.description: Recite Ibrahim's du'a from Surah Ibrahim — the prayer of a man who lost everything and gave everything.

stages.title: Your Prophetic Lesson
stages.description: What trial are you facing? Maulana connects Ibrahim's story to your life. Continue with Ask Imam.

title: The Gate of Tawbah
tagline: Every door is open to the one who returns — your sincere repentance is never too late.

stages.title: Allah's Door Is Always Open
stages.description: Maulana recites the Ayah of Hope — Az-Zumar 39:53 — and speaks on the infinite mercy of Tawbah.

stages.title: Sayyid Al-Istighfar
stages.description: The Master of Repentance. Recite this supplication three times with presence and sincerity.

stages.title: A New Beginning
stages.description: The Maulana closes your Tawbah journey with warmth. Ask Imam to continue your personal renewal.

title: The Knowledge Seeker
tagline: Seeking knowledge is an act of worship — each lesson a step closer to Allah.

stages.title: Iqra — The Command to Read
stages.description: Maulana meditates on the first revelation and the Islamic tradition of 'Ilm — a civilisation built on knowledge.

stages.title: Surah Al-Alaq — Full
stages.description: Recite all 19 verses of the Surah of the Clinging Clot — the very genesis of the Quran.

stages.title: Scholar's First Milestone
stages.description: You've begun the path of the seeker. Continue your Islamic studies with personalized Ask Imam guidance.

title: The Family Covenant
tagline: The family is a mercy from Allah — nurture it with patience, love, and Quranic wisdom.

stages.title: Marriage, Mercy & Tranquility
stages.description: Maulana explains Ar-Rum 30:21 — the Quranic vision of a home filled with mawaddah and rahmah.

stages.title: The Family Du'a
stages.description: Recite the Quranic du'a of the righteous: 'Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes.'

stages.title: Strengthening Your Bond
stages.description: A warm closing reflection. Share your family intentions with Ask Imam for tailored Quranic guidance.
